# `draw.highlighter`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `polylines`
> **Wire kind:** `highlighter`

Draw a freehand highlighter stroke ‚Äî a thick translucent polyline
through N world anchors. Renders with `ctx.globalAlpha = style.alpha`
wrapped around the stroke so the rest of the frame is unaffected.
Supply 2..500 anchors (validator pins this range, matching
invinite's stroke cap). Both `style.color` and `style.alpha` are
required. Mirrors invinite's `highlighter-tool.ts` shape.

## Anchors

`anchors` ‚Äî `ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>` of length 2..500

Anchor count: 2..500.

## Signature

```ts
function highlighter(anchors: ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>, opts: HighlighterStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite ‚Äî script authors call `draw.highlighter(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.highlighter demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.highlighter(
                [
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.high },
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.low },
                ],
                { color: "#facc15", alpha: 0.3 },
            );
        },
    });
```
